# INStartCallCallCapabilityUnsupportedReason.microphoneNotAccessible

**Case**

The microphone isn’t accessible.

## Declaration

```swift
case microphoneNotAccessible
```

## Constants

- **INStartCallCallCapabilityUnsupportedReason.videoCallUnsupported**: The app doesn’t support video calls.
- **INStartCallCallCapabilityUnsupportedReason.cameraNotAccessible**: The camera isn’t accessible.

items.description: The app doesn’t support video calls.
